message:
test(conformance): add boundary parity regression tests and fix missing view helpers

Add 3 conformance tests for boundary_conditions fixture:
- top_picks excludes in_progress issues (parity regression guard)
- recommendations include action and type fields (parity field guard)
- plan output has total_actionable, total_blocked, track_id, status, priority

Also restore cached_view_width/cached_view_height helpers that were
dropped during concurrent splitter refactoring.

Conformance: 75 → 78 tests (100%).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
